case_title: VYAS, HEMLATA vs. BATCHELOR, JOSEPH et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT BATCHELOR, JOSEPH

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BATCHELOR, JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 610 FILLMORE ST, #209 $1,300.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,300.00, STAYED UNTIL NOV-08-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT. VACATES BY 08-NOV-94, AND LEAVES PREMISES BROOM CLEAN, PLTF. SHALL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, OR DEFT. MAY MAKE A MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT & PLTF. WILL COOPERATE WITH DEFT; WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT EVICTION STAYED UNTIL 08-NOV-94; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
